data.title: Peter Schiff Sees A Dangerous Message In Silver And Treasuries
data.description:
Silver prices have surged to record territory, drawing renewed attention to precious metals as U. S. bond yields continue climbing. According to Peter Schiff, silver is now trading at an all-time high, while gold has risen more than $70 and sits less than $30 away from setting a new record
source: https://www.ethnews.com/peter-schiff-sees-a-dangerous-message-in-silver-and-treasuries/

data.title: Coinbase teams up with Standard Chartered to scale institutional crypto access
data.description:
Coinbase and Standard Chartered have expanded their partnership to develop a broader range of crypto services, targeting institutional clients and focusing on regulated access to digital asset markets. The collaboration centers on building trading, custody, staking, and lending capabilities designed to meet institutional requirements for security, compliance, and settlement efficiency. The partnership brings together Coinbase, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-teams-up-with-standard-chartered/

data.title: Interactive Brokers Opens $757 Billion Platform to Stablecoin Deposits
data.description:
Key Insights Interactive Brokers rolled out stablecoin funding for individual brokerage accounts, as Bloomberg News reported on December 12. The feature launched with a subset of eligible US clients and marked a shift in how retail investors accessed traditional securities markets.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/12/12/interactive-brokers-opens-757-billion-platform-to-stablecoin-deposits/

data.title: Trump says he is picking Hassett or Warsh for Fed chair because they’ll cut rates to the % he wants
data.description:
Donald Trump on Friday said he’s down to either Kevin Hassett and Kevin Warsh for the next Federal Reserve chair, telling The Wall Street Journal that both men would help bring interest rates to the level he wants, which is “around 1% or even lower. ” Trump explained that Warsh, who once served as a Fed […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-picking-hassett-or-warsh-for-fed-chair/

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Buyers Quietly Accumulate As Flows Stay Below 2024 Peaks
data.description:
Bitcoin-focused treasury companies continue to accumulate BTC in a selective but steady manner, according to data shared by Glassnode. While overall inflows remain well below the sharp accumulation spikes seen in late 2024, buying activity has broadened across a wider range of corporate participants.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-treasury-buyers-quietly-accumulate-as-flows-stay-below-2024-peaks/
